reason: This is a common Islamic hadith about the virtues of reading Surah Al-Kahf on Fridays, widely shared by mainstream Muslims. Contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: قال رسـول الله ﷺ( من قرأ سورةَ الكهفِ في يومِ الجمعةِ ، أضاء له من النورِ ما بين الجمُعتَينِ ) صححه الألباني
